rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scope only when binding implementation-level outputs or auxiliary variables; avoid guarantees in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component structure by anchoring AGREE contracts to visible features and declared variables only.
Use component type scope for input/output range contracts; use implementation scope only for assignments tied to existing outputs.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax with valid AADL-scoped identifiers.
Range comparisons must use numeric types explicitly declared or exposed as ports; do not infer types from port names.
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables.
Do not encode event ports as numeric or Boolean values unless a data value is explicitly provided in the model.
